posts.author: andrewst (Tyler Andrews)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

Rather than duplicating a Dashboard which is an options, we would like to create a Dashboard as a template. This would allow automation of a Dashboard being creatable when an item in another board reaches a certain status and more. We currently have a dashboard set up to show specific information from our project WBS board.
